parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Caller
participant ":RoomTransactionService" as RTS
participant ":RoomTransactionCommand" as RTC
participant ":Nats Streaming" as Nats

Caller -> RTS : Create(context, payload)
RTS -> RTS : Validate()

alt "Data Not Valid"
    RTS --> Caller : UnprocessableEntity
else
    loop "For each shift"
        RTS -> RTS : rt := RoomTransactionModel()
        RTS -> RTC : Create(context, rt)
        RTC --> RTS : uuid
    end
    RTS -> Nats : publishTransactionCreated(context, []uuid)
    Nats --> RTS : published
    RTS --> Caller : created
end
@enduml
```
